name: 322-phase3-daemon-projection-cutover
title: Cut daemon app-context off from manager-backed derived mounts: replace manager -> VFS projection in the daemon path with VFS-first derived mounts, leaving managers as cache/index helpers instead of the live mount source.
description: Workstream A continuation of #322: remove daemon app-context manager-backed derived mounts and converge the live mount surface on VFS-first projections.
creator: cursor-agent
